title: 3 Asian Stocks That Could Be Trading At Discounts Of Up To 31%
content:
As global markets navigate a complex landscape of steady interest rates and fluctuating consumer confidence, Asian stock markets have shown mixed performance, with China's CSI 300 Index remaining relatively stable while Japan's indices experienced declines. In this environment, identifying undervalued stocks can be particularly appealing to investors seeking opportunities amid broader market uncertainties.

Top 10 Undervalued Stocks Based On Cash Flows In Asia

Here we highlight a subset of our preferred stocks from the screener.

Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology

Overview: Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology Co., Ltd. is a medical device company specializing in neuro- and peripheral-vascular interventional devices, operating both in China and internationally, with a market cap of HK$8.37 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue of CN¥898.46 million from the sale of neurovascular and peripheral-vascular interventional surgical devices.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 22.6%

Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology is trading at HK$24.8, below its estimated future cash flow value of HK$32.05, suggesting it may be undervalued based on cash flows. Despite significant insider selling recently, the company forecasts robust earnings growth of 36.3% annually over the next three years, outpacing Hong Kong's market average. Recent product innovations showcased at their Investor Open Day further strengthen their competitive position in endovascular technology and support potential revenue growth beyond market expectations.

The growth report we've compiled suggests that Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology's future prospects could be on the up. Get an in-depth perspective on Zylox-Tonbridge Medical Technology's balance sheet by reading our health report here.SEHK:2190 Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Beijing Roborock Technology

Overview: Beijing Roborock Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in the design, research and development, production, and sales of intelligent sweeping robots in China with a market cap of CN¥38.17 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: The company's revenue primarily comes from its Intelligent Cleaning Products segment, which generated CN¥17.00 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 31%

Beijing Roborock Technology is trading at CN¥147.32, below its estimated future cash flow value of CN¥213.48, indicating undervaluation based on cash flows. Despite a drop in profit margins from 21.7% to 9.1%, earnings are forecast to grow significantly at 30.8% annually, surpassing China's market growth rate of 28.5%. The company recently completed a share buyback worth CN¥73.87 million, reflecting strategic financial management amid its removal from an index constituent list in December 2025.

Insights from our recent growth report point to a promising forecast for Beijing Roborock Technology's business outlook. Dive into the specifics of Beijing Roborock Technology here with our thorough financial health report.SHSE:688169 Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Better Life Commercial Chain ShareLtd

Overview: Better Life Commercial Chain Share Co., Ltd operates in the commercial retail sector in China with a market cap of CN¥13.98 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue primarily comes from the Wholesale and Retail Industry, amounting to CN¥2.86 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 26.3%

Better Life Commercial Chain ShareLtd is trading at CN¥5.2, below its estimated future cash flow value of CN¥7.05, highlighting undervaluation based on cash flows. Revenue is projected to grow at 31.2% annually, outpacing the Chinese market's average growth rate of 14.7%. Although Return on Equity is expected to remain low at 7.1% in three years, the company anticipates becoming profitable within that period with earnings growth forecasted at a substantial 88.75% per year.

title: Asian Stocks Trading At Estimated Discounts Up To 28.7%
content:
As global markets navigate a period of economic uncertainty, Asian stock markets have shown mixed performance, with China's mainland indices remaining relatively stable and Japan's market experiencing declines due to currency fluctuations and geopolitical concerns. In this environment, identifying undervalued stocks can be crucial for investors looking to capitalize on potential growth opportunities; such stocks often present attractive valuations relative to their intrinsic worth, offering potential upside as market conditions evolve.

Top 10 Undervalued Stocks Based On Cash Flows In Asia

Name Current Price Fair Value (Est) Discount (Est) Zhejiang Century Huatong GroupLtd (SZSE:002602) CN¥19.53 CN¥38.86 49.7% Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical (SEHK:6990) HK$422.80 HK$834.50 49.3% Shuangdeng Group (SEHK:6960) HK$14.45 HK$28.47 49.3% Ningxia Building Materials GroupLtd (SHSE:600449) CN¥13.16 CN¥26.20 49.8% Morimatsu International Holdings (SEHK:2155) HK$10.18 HK$20.23 49.7% GigaVis (KOSDAQ:A420770) ₩57800.00 ₩115523.82 50% Genesem (KOSDAQ:A217190) ₩6240.00 ₩12405.53 49.7% Forth Corporation (SET:FORTH) THB5.65 THB11.16 49.4% BEAUTY GARAGE (TSE:3180) ¥1415.00 ¥2785.12 49.2% Asia-potash International Investment (Guangzhou)Co.Ltd (SZSE:000893) CN¥54.55 CN¥107.83 49.4%

Click here to see the full list of 248 stocks from our Undervalued Asian Stocks Based On Cash Flows screener.

Let's dive into some prime choices out of the screener.

Cirrus Aircraft

Overview: Cirrus Aircraft Limited, along with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells piston aircraft and single-engine turbine jets globally, with a market cap of HK$22.95 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue from its Aerospace & Defense segment, amounting to $1.32 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 28.2%

Cirrus Aircraft, trading at HK$62.7, is considered undervalued with its estimated future cash flow value at HK$87.36. The company has been experiencing robust earnings growth of 53.2% over the past year and is forecasted to continue growing revenue at 15.6% per year, outpacing the Hong Kong market's average growth rate of 8.4%. Recent product innovations like the G3 Vision Jet and SR Series G7+ enhance its market position and potential for increased cash flows.

In light of our recent growth report, it seems possible that Cirrus Aircraft's financial performance will exceed current levels. Click to explore a detailed breakdown of our findings in Cirrus Aircraft's balance sheet health report.SEHK:2507 Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

Shanghai MicroPort Endovascular MedTech

Overview: Shanghai MicroPort Endovascular MedTech Co., Ltd. operates in the medical technology sector, focusing on the development and manufacturing of endovascular devices, with a market cap of approximately CN¥11.80 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: The company generates revenue primarily from its medical products segment, which amounts to CN¥1.25 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 12.1%

Shanghai MicroPort Endovascular MedTech, priced at CN¥97.63, is trading below its estimated future cash flow value of CN¥111.01. Despite a decline in profit margins from 51.8% to 30.2%, the company anticipates significant earnings growth of 30.3% annually over the next three years, outpacing the Chinese market's average growth rate. However, its dividend yield of 1.69% lacks coverage by free cash flows, and its return on equity forecast remains modest at 17.4%.

Our comprehensive growth report raises the possibility that Shanghai MicroPort Endovascular MedTech is poised for substantial financial growth. Navigate through the intricacies of Shanghai MicroPort Endovascular MedTech with our comprehensive financial health report here.SHSE:688016 Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

TORIDOLL Holdings

Overview: TORIDOLL Holdings Corporation operates and manages restaurants both in Japan and internationally, with a market cap of ¥371.21 billion.

Operations: The company's revenue segments include Marugame Seimen at ¥134.37 billion and Overseas Business at ¥103.21 billion.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 28.7%

TORIDOLL Holdings, trading at ¥4,224, is undervalued based on its discounted cash flow value of ¥5,922.72. The company anticipates revenue of JPY 282 billion and profit attributable to owners at JPY 5.5 billion for fiscal year ending March 2026. With earnings forecasted to grow by 33.67% annually over the next three years—outpacing Japan's market growth—the stock presents a compelling valuation despite a low future return on equity forecast of 11.3%.

The growth report we've compiled suggests that TORIDOLL Holdings' future prospects could be on the up. Click here and access our complete balance sheet health report to understand the dynamics of TORIDOLL Holdings.TSE:3397 Discounted Cash Flow as at Feb 2026

title: Global Value Stock Picks Including 3 Companies That Investors Might Be Undervaluing
content:
In the current global market landscape, investors are navigating a mixed bag of economic signals, from Japan's highest interest rate hike in 30 years to a cooling U.S. inflation report that has buoyed some indices. Amid these fluctuations, identifying undervalued stocks can be an attractive strategy for those looking to capitalize on discrepancies between market price and intrinsic value, particularly when broader concerns about valuations and spending in sectors like AI persist.

Top 10 Undervalued Stocks Based On Cash Flows

Saudi Paper Manufacturing

Overview: Saudi Paper Manufacturing Company, with a market cap of SAR2.20 billion, produces and distributes paper pulp and tissue products within Saudi Arabia, the Gulf Cooperation Council countries, and internationally.

Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its Manufacturing segment, which accounts for SAR918.01 million, complemented by the Trading and Others segment contributing SAR59.85 million.

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 35.4%

Saudi Paper Manufacturing is trading 35.4% below its estimated fair value of SAR91.96, with a current price of SAR59.4, indicating it may be undervalued based on cash flows. Despite recent declines in sales and net income, the company expects significant earnings growth of 32.3% annually over the next three years, outpacing the Saudi market's average growth rate. However, profit margins have decreased from 12.4% to 5.2%, and interest payments are not well-covered by earnings.

Hangzhou SF Intra-city Industrial is trading at HK$11.11, well below its estimated fair value of HK$16.38, suggesting it could be undervalued based on cash flows. With earnings growth forecasted at 53.6% annually, significantly above the Hong Kong market average, the company demonstrates strong potential despite a low future return on equity of 16.6%. Operations: The company's revenue is primarily derived from its segments: Tabelog (¥36.75 billion), Kakaku.Com (¥24.04 billion), Kyujin Box (¥17.31 billion), and Incubation (¥8.91 billion).

Estimated Discount To Fair Value: 32.3%

Kakaku.com is trading at ¥2355, significantly below its estimated fair value of ¥3476.04, indicating potential undervaluation based on cash flows. title: 3 Asian Stocks That May Be Trading Below Their Estimated Value
content:

Zhou Liu Fu Jewellery, a smaller player in the jewelry market, has been making strides with its financial performance.
